title: Widget Gallery
description: Reference gallery with examples of every widget type the app supports. Useful both for humans creating dashboards manually and for the AI assistant — every widget here is known to validate and render correctly. Hover the ⓘ icons to see the per-type gotchas.

widgets.title: Total Income (KPI)
widgets.helpText: Single-value metric. Use multiCurrency:true when the query GROUPs BY currency — the runtime then displays one figure per currency. clickLink navigates to a filtered transactions view.
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) * -1 AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Income' AND year = :year GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency

widgets.title: Monthly Income & Expenses (Bar)
widgets.helpText: Multi-series bar chart. Each series has its own entry in options.series with type:'bar' and encode:{x,y} mapping column names from the query. seriesClickLinks lets each series navigate to a different filter; set a key to null to disable click-through for that series.
widgets.query: SELECT year_month, SUBSTR('JanFebMarAprMayJunJulAugSepOctNovDec', (CAST(strftime('%m', year_month || '-01') AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3 + 1, 3) AS month_label, year_month || '-01' AS dateFrom, date(year_month || '-01', '+1 month', '-1 day') AS dateTo, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Income' THEN -amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Expenses' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS expenses, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Income' THEN -amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Expenses' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS savings FROM postings WHERE year = :year AND currency = :currency AND account_type IN ('Income', 'Expenses') GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month

widgets.title: Income Trend (Line)
widgets.helpText: Line chart. Identical to bar except chartType:'line' and series[].type:'line'. Add 'smooth':true for curved lines, 'symbol':'circle' to mark each point.
widgets.query: SELECT year_month, SUBSTR('JanFebMarAprMayJunJulAugSepOctNovDec', (CAST(strftime('%m', year_month || '-01') AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3 + 1, 3) AS month_label, ROUND(SUM(-amount), 2) AS income FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Income' AND year = :year AND currency = :currency GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month

widgets.title: Cumulative Net Cash Flow (Area)
widgets.helpText: Area chart. Set chartType:'area' but the series.type stays 'line' — area is just a line series with an 'areaStyle':{} object. Combine with smooth:true for a flowing fill. Good for cumulative / running-total visuals.
widgets.query: WITH monthly AS (SELECT year_month, SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Income' THEN -amount WHEN account_type = 'Expenses' THEN -amount ELSE 0 END) AS delta FROM postings WHERE year = :year AND currency = :currency AND account_type IN ('Income', 'Expenses') GROUP BY year_month) SELECT year_month, SUBSTR('JanFebMarAprMayJunJulAugSepOctNovDec', (CAST(strftime('%m', year_month || '-01') AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3 + 1, 3) AS month_label, ROUND(SUM(delta) OVER (ORDER BY year_month), 2) AS net FROM monthly ORDER BY year_month

widgets.title: Assets Breakdown (Pie)
widgets.helpText: Query MUST return columns named 'name' (slice label) and 'value' (slice size). Use HAVING value > 0 — pie cannot display negatives or zeros. radius:['35%','65%'] makes a donut; '50%' makes a solid pie.
widgets.query: SELECT CASE WHEN account LIKE 'Assets:Liquid:%' THEN REPLACE(account, 'Assets:Liquid:', '') WHEN account LIKE 'Assets:Investments:%' THEN REPLACE(account, 'Assets:Investments:', '') ELSE REPLACE(account, 'Assets:', '') END AS name, account, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS value FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Assets' AND currency = :currency GROUP BY account HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC

widgets.title: Expense Distribution (Scatter)
widgets.helpText: Each row in the result is one point. encode:{x,y} maps columns to coordinates; symbolSize can also be encoded for variable-size points. Useful for distributions and outlier-spotting.
widgets.query: SELECT transaction_date, ROUND(amount, 2) AS amount, account FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Expenses' AND year = :year AND currency = :currency AND amount > 0 ORDER BY transaction_date

widgets.title: Expenses by Category (Treemap)
widgets.helpText: Treemap is the trickiest chart type. Query MUST return columns named 'name' and 'value'. Do NOT set encode — the runtime injects rows directly into series[0].data. Use HAVING value > 0 (treemap rejects negatives and zeros). Skip label colour overrides — the component auto-adjusts label contrast against the box colour.
widgets.query: SELECT REPLACE(account, 'Expenses:', '') AS name, account, SUM(amount) AS value FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Expenses' AND year = :year AND currency = :currency GROUP BY account HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC

widgets.title: Largest Expenses (Table)
widgets.helpText: Plain table. columns[].key matches a column name from the query. align is 'left'|'center'|'right'. format applies a predefined formatter (currency, compact, accountName, etc.). Use link for per-cell click-through; the runtime interpolates {{row.field}} from the row data.
widgets.query: SELECT transaction_date, transaction_payee AS payee, REPLACE(account, 'Expenses:', '') AS category, ROUND(amount, 2) AS amount, account FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Expenses' AND year = :year AND currency = :currency ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Income → Expenses → Savings (Funnel)
widgets.helpText: Funnel chart shows ranked stages, larger at top, narrowing down. Query MUST return columns named 'name' (stage label) and 'value' (stage size). Like pie/treemap, the runtime injects rows into series[0].data — do NOT use encode. Use HAVING value > 0 (negatives don't make sense for stages). Good for budget/savings allocation.
widgets.query: WITH totals AS (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Income' THEN -amount ELSE 0 END) AS income, SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Expenses' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS expenses FROM postings WHERE year = :year AND currency = :currency AND account_type IN ('Income', 'Expenses')) SELECT 'Income' AS name, income AS value FROM totals UNION ALL SELECT 'After Expenses', income - expenses FROM totals UNION ALL SELECT 'Net Savings', CASE WHEN income - expenses > 0 THEN income - expenses ELSE 0 END FROM totals

widgets.title: Savings Rate (Gauge)
widgets.helpText: Gauge shows a single value against a min/max range. Query should return ONE row with a numeric column. The runtime injects the first row into series[0].data — do NOT use encode. Set series.min, series.max, and use detail.formatter for the centered display. Great for budget progress (% used) and savings rate.
widgets.query: WITH totals AS (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Income' THEN -amount ELSE 0 END) AS income, SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Expenses' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS expenses FROM postings WHERE year = :year AND currency = :currency AND account_type IN ('Income', 'Expenses')) SELECT ROUND(MAX(0, MIN(100, CASE WHEN income > 0 THEN ((income - expenses) * 100.0 / income) ELSE 0 END)), 1) AS value, 'Savings Rate' AS name FROM totals

widgets.title: Daily Spending (Calendar Heatmap)
widgets.helpText: Calendar heatmap shows one cell per day across a year. Query MUST return columns named 'date' (YYYY-MM-DD) and 'value' (numeric). The runtime projects rows to [date, value] pairs. The chart needs a top-level `calendar` option specifying the year `range`, and a `visualMap` for the colour scale. Use chartType:'calendar', series.type:'heatmap', series.coordinateSystem:'calendar'.
widgets.query: SELECT transaction_date AS date, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS value FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Expenses' AND year = :year AND currency = :currency AND amount > 0 GROUP BY transaction_date ORDER BY transaction_date

widgets.title: Expenses by Account × Month (Pivot)
widgets.helpText: Pivot needs a 'transform' of type 'pivot' that names rowField (the row-label column), columnField (which becomes column headers) and valueField (cell values). The visualization just consumes the pivoted result. Use formatColumn:'monthYear' to render YYYY-MM as 'January 2026'.
widgets.query: SELECT account, year_month, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Expenses' AND year = :year AND currency = :currency GROUP BY account, year_month ORDER BY account, year_month
